channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: France passes bill banning social media for children under 15
item.description: Macron aims for the law to take effect by September, but it faces constitutional review and challenges over age verification and existing accounts.

item.title: Study: AI boosted homework scores 18% but tanked exam results 20%
item.description: A debate rages over whether Gen Z is less cognitively capable than previous generations. A study of 26,800 high school students examined AI's impact.

item.title: A FINRA for AI? Google DeepMind CEO's idea gains traction, but is it effective?
item.description: The self-regulatory model for financial brokerages has faced conflict-of-interest concerns, raising doubts about its suitability for AI oversight.

item.title: Jamie Dimon: Insecurity, not ego, is what ruins top CEOs' careers
item.description: The JPMorgan CEO warns that leaders falter when insecurity prevents employees from sharing bad news.
